title: Dispatch Operations Dashboard
meeting_summary: A regional logistics company needs a dispatch dashboard to assign drivers, track deliveries in real time, and generate daily performance reports. The system must integrate with their existing fleet API and support dispatcher and manager roles.

breakdown.task: Backend API for orders, routes, and driver status
Fleet API integration and data mapping
Role-based access control and audit logs

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Dispatch Operations Dashboard

### Phase 1 — Discovery & Design (weeks 1–2)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Discovery and requirements workshops | Tech Lead | 18 | 1,125 |
| UI/UX design (dashboard, filters, alerts) | Designer | 32 | 2,000 |

**Phase subtotal: 50h / 3,125 EUR**

### Phase 2 — Development (weeks 3–8)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Backend API for orders, routes, driver status | Backend Dev | 60 | 3,750 |
| Real-time updates (websocket layer) | Backend Dev | 28 | 1,750 |
| Fleet API integration and data mapping | Backend Dev | 30 | 1,875 |
| Role-based access control and audit logs | Backend Dev | 16 | 1,000 |
| Reporting module (daily KPIs, CSV export) | Full-Stack | 20 | 1,250 |

**Phase subtotal: 154h / 9,625 EUR**

### Phase 3 — QA & Deployment (weeks 9–10)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| QA and UAT support | QA | 24 | 1,500 |
| Deployment and monitoring setup | DevOps | 12 | 750 |

**Phase subtotal: 36h / 2,250 EUR**

### Totals

- **Total hours:** 240
- **Total cost:** 15,000 EUR
- **Team:** 2 Full-Stack Devs, 1 Designer (PT), 1 QA (PT)
- **Duration:** 10 weeks

### Technical Risks
- Fleet API schema may be undocumented or unstable.
- WebSocket layer requires load testing under concurrent connections.

### Assumptions
- Fleet API provides a stable REST interface.
- Client supplies test credentials by week 1.

title: Fitness Studio Booking App
meeting_summary: A boutique fitness studio wants a mobile app where members can book classes, purchase packages, and receive push notifications for schedule changes. Staff need an admin panel to manage instructors and capacity.

breakdown.task: Mobile app UI/UX and design system
Admin panel for schedules and instructors
QA, app store preparation, and release

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Fitness Studio Booking App

### Phase 1 — Discovery & Design (weeks 1–2)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Product discovery and user flows | Tech Lead | 20 | 1,250 |
| Mobile app UI/UX and design system | Designer | 40 | 2,500 |

**Phase subtotal: 60h / 3,750 EUR**

### Phase 2 — Development (weeks 3–10)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| iOS and Android app development | Mobile Dev x2 | 110 | 6,875 |
| Payments and package management | Backend Dev | 24 | 1,500 |
| Admin panel for schedules and instructors | Full-Stack | 36 | 2,250 |
| Push notification service | Backend Dev | 18 | 1,125 |
| Analytics and retention dashboards | Full-Stack | 16 | 1,000 |

**Phase subtotal: 204h / 12,750 EUR**

### Phase 3 — QA & Release (weeks 11–12)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| QA, app store preparation, and release | QA | 26 | 1,625 |

**Phase subtotal: 26h / 1,625 EUR**

### Totals

- **Total hours:** 290
- **Total cost:** 18,125 EUR
- **Team:** 2 Mobile Devs, 1 Backend Dev (PT), 1 Designer (PT)
- **Duration:** 12 weeks

### Technical Risks
- App store review timelines can delay go-live by 1–2 weeks.
- Payment gateway sandbox environment may differ from production behaviour.

### Assumptions
- Target platforms are iOS 16+ and Android 12+.
- Payment provider is Stripe (SDK-based integration).

title: Client Onboarding Compliance Tool
meeting_summary: A financial advisory firm needs an internal web tool to capture client onboarding data, track document status, and generate compliance-ready summaries. The tool must integrate with their CRM and enforce access controls by role.
estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Client Onboarding Compliance Tool

### Phase 1 — Discovery & Design (weeks 1–2)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Requirements and compliance review | Tech Lead | 22 | 1,375 |
| UI/UX design for onboarding flows | Designer | 28 | 1,750 |

**Phase subtotal: 50h / 3,125 EUR**

### Phase 2 — Development (weeks 3–9)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Core onboarding workflows and validation | Backend Dev | 70 | 4,375 |
| Document tracking and status automation | Full-Stack | 36 | 2,250 |
| CRM integration and data sync | Backend Dev | 30 | 1,875 |
| Role-based permissions and audit logs | Backend Dev | 20 | 1,250 |
| Reporting and compliance summaries | Full-Stack | 24 | 1,500 |

**Phase subtotal: 180h / 11,250 EUR**

### Phase 3 — QA & Deployment (weeks 10–11)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| QA, security review, and hardening | QA | 28 | 1,750 |
| Deployment and training materials | DevOps | 12 | 750 |

**Phase subtotal: 40h / 2,500 EUR**

### Totals

- **Total hours:** 270
- **Total cost:** 16,875 EUR
- **Team:** 2 Full-Stack Devs, 1 QA (PT)
- **Duration:** 11 weeks

### Technical Risks
- CRM API may require a custom adapter if no standard connector exists.
- Compliance requirements may evolve during development, requiring rework.

### Assumptions
- CRM exposes a REST API with documented auth.
- Compliance rules are finalised before development starts.
